International Exchange Programs

Erasmus Programme

MENU

Dear Students,

The in-person visits to Erasmus Office

is done on an appointment basis. In order for us to provide a better communication with you visits without appointment is not preferred.

Please direct all of your visit request by writing an EMAIL to

erasmus@okan.edu.tr

address and have your appointment date and time confirmed.

Wishing you all the success!

Istanbul Okan University gives particular importance to its international relations. The specialized, practice-oriented education that Okan provides necessitates cooperation with international universities that focus on the same characteristics.

Istanbul Okan University's Erasmus Programme Office coordinates and implements our bilateral and multilateral agreements and protocols with European universities while helping the students to find and select universities for study- abroad.
